✦ The Woman Behind The Chair ✦

Meet
Lizelle

Founder & Creative Director

Thairapy Hair Salon is Welkom's premier destination for precision colour, cuts and hair transformations. Founded by Lizelle in 2020, the salon has grown into a trusted space where clients return not just for their hair — but for the experience.

With a full range of professional hair services tailored to each client's unique style and needs, Lizelle and her team bring passion, expertise and genuine care to every single appointment.

"We are dedicated to helping you look and feel your best. Book your appointment today and let us bring your hair vision to life."

— Lizelle, Founder

✦ What We Offer ✦

Every service, tailored to you

Cuts & Styling

From a classic trim to a bold new shape — precision cuts tailored to your face, texture and lifestyle.

Colour & Foils

Full colour, highlights, foils and toning. Lizelle specialises in achieving your perfect shade with expert colour theory.

Blow Dry & Finish

A professional blow dry and style finish that lasts. Walk out feeling polished, confident and camera-ready.

Hair Extensions

Add length, volume and drama with professional hair extensions fitted by our specialist Angelique.

Treatments

Deep conditioning, keratin treatments and scalp care — restore health, shine and strength to your hair.

Makeup Artistry

Full makeup application for special occasions, events and photoshoots. Look flawless from every angle.
